query:
SELECT 'transactions' as tabla, COUNT(*) as registros, COALESCE(SUM(amount)/100, 0) as total_euros FROM transactions
UNION ALL
SELECT 'reservations', COUNT(*), COALESCE(SUM(amount_paid)/100, 0) FROM reservations
UNION ALL
SELECT 'invoices', COUNT(*), COALESCE(SUM(CAST(total AS DECIMAL(10,2))), 0) FROM invoices
UNION ALL
SELECT 'expenses', COUNT(*), COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) FROM expenses
UNION ALL
SELECT 'bookings', COUNT(*), COALESCE(SUM(amount_paid)/100, 0) FROM bookings;
